one_law: Free/cheap first for bulk+check; escalate to Sonnet-class for build/act; Opus/o1 only for critical/reason when ROI gate passes.

bulk.label: Massive work
bulk.hint: Highest volume · lowest $/token — drafts, rows, exploration

build.label: Build
build.hint: Code gen · patches · refactors · ship-quality output

act.label: Act
act.hint: Execute plans · tool-heavy · multi-step agent turns

check.label: Check
check.hint: Verify · lint · read-only audit · Haiku-class ROI

critical.label: Critical
critical.hint: Governance · security · no-fail decisions — spend only when blocked
